title: fragaria breslingea var. pratensis
intro: Fragaria breslingea var. pratensis, also known as the alpine strawberry, is a type of low-growing, spreading plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fragaria breslingea var. pratensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
